creator: reg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Wed, Jan 19, 2000 at 11:09:21PM +0100, Marc van Woerkom wrote:
> 	The mozilla configure script expects a glib-version installed,
>         where the FreeBSD port of glib installs glib12-version.

GLIB_CONFIG=glib12-config; export GLIB_CONFIG

or

setenv GLIB_CONFIG glib12-config

Regards,
 -Jeremy

-- 
FreeBSD - Because the best things in life are free...
                                           http://www.freebsd.org/
